info.name: Book store - Automated Regression Suite (Automate Now)
info.description:
Automates the 35 'Automate Now' test cases from OUTPUT/Automation_Plan.md (Positive + Idempotency types only). Each folder is self-contained: it provisions its own fixture data, exercises the endpoint(s) under test, and cleans up via delete where applicable, so folders can be run independently or the whole collection can be run end-to-end via Collection Runner or Newman. 'Automate Later' test cases (Negative/Boundary/Security, where the spec does not document an expected error status) are intentionally excluded here per the Automation Plan's classification policy.

IMPORTANT FINDING (2026-07-15): this live API is stateless - POST/PUT/DELETE are validated and echoed with 200 but never actually persisted, and GET only ever serves a fixed, unchanging seed dataset regardless of any writes. 'Get by id' checks therefore target an id discovered from the corresponding list response (a real seed record), not a freshly created one. The CATALOG folder's cross-resource lookups (author/cover-photo by book id) are similarly logged rather than asserted, since the created associations are never actually retrievable. See PROJECT_STATE.md and Risk_Assessment.md for the full implications of this finding.
